name: obsidian-vault-assistant
description: Codex plugin for Obsidian vaults: search context, enrich notes, build structure, and flag stale content.

interface.shortDescription: Search, structure, and enrich an Obsidian vault locally
interface.longDescription: A modular Codex plugin for local Obsidian vault work: search context, enrich evergreen notes, create templates, repair structure, and audit stale or inconsistent markdown. Independent software, not affiliated with Obsidian.
defaultPrompt: Search the vault for relevant context and summarize it.
Find stale notes, broken links, and structural drift.
Generate or improve templates for recurring note types.
